title: Natural Breezes
description: Breezes can spawn in high-altitude mountain biomes like Jagged Peaks, Frozen Peaks, and Stony Peaks.
body: Breezes can now spawn in the higher mountain biomes — Jagged Peaks, Frozen Peaks, and Stony Peaks. It’s a small tweak I made for my personal Minecraft server, but honestly, I think it makes a lot of sense.
